title: Needle Punching Pillow Workshop
content: Explore EventsSign InHosted ByLe Studio AnthostContact the HostReport EventArts & CultureNeedle Punching Pillow WorkshopHosted by Le Studio Anthost273 Calyer StKings County, New YorkGet TicketsWelcome! Please choose your desired ticket type:StandardPillow case onlyPremiumPillow case and InsertCreative Duo - StandardBring a friend and double the fun – this ticket is valid for two!Creative Duo - PremiumBring a friend and double the fun – this ticket is valid for two!Get TicketYou will be asked to verify token ownership with your wallet.About Event​Join us for an evening workshop at our artist’s studio in Greenpoint and create your own custom pillow cover using needle punch and wool techniques.​​🧵What you’ll do:– Discover the art of needle punch embroidery– Work with a curated selection of wool yarns– Design and craft your own one-of-a-kind pillow cover​​🥂What’s included:– All materials– A glass of wine & bites– A cozy atmosphere inside our atelier​​📍Location:Le Studio Anthost – Greenpoint, BrooklynAn intimate artist’s atelier nestled in the heart of the creative scene​​🎟️ No experience needed – beginners welcome!​Cancellation Policy:Due to the small-group format of this workshop, tickets are generally non-refundable. However, if something unexpected comes up, please contact the host. In some cases, we can offer a credit for a future class or a partial refund.Location273 Calyer StBrooklyn, NY 11222, USAHosted ByLe Studio AnthostContact the HostReport EventArts & CultureDiscoverPricingHelpHost your event with Luma↗
